diagnosis.title: Could You Be Required to Report?

items.title: Overseas Exchange Assets
items.description: You hold crypto assets on exchanges like Binance, Bybit, or OKX

items.title: Assets Over ₩500M
items.description: Your total overseas financial assets exceeded ₩500M at any point last year

items.title: Spread Across Exchanges
items.description: Assets are scattered across multiple exchanges, making totals hard to track

items.title: Currency Conversion
items.description: Complex USD/USDT exchange rates make it hard to know exact KRW amounts

items.title: Never Filed Before
items.description: You have never reported overseas financial assets to the tax office

diagnosis.conclusion: If any of these apply, it's time to check now

items.question: How do I know if I need to report?
items.answer: If your combined overseas financial account balances exceed ₩500M at any month-end during the year, you are required to report. Link your exchanges on ZKAP to check automatically.

items.question: Which exchanges are supported?
items.answer: We support 4 overseas (Binance, Bybit, OKX, Coinbase) and 4 domestic (Upbit, Bithumb, Coinone, Korbit) exchanges — 8 total.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: The app download, exchange linking, and asset viewing are all free. Tax filing service fees are provided separately.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Absolutely. ZKAP can only view your assets — it's impossible to move or trade your coins.

items.question: When is the reporting deadline?
items.answer: June 1–30 every year. Missing the deadline results in immediate penalties, so start early.

items.question: What happens if I don't report?
items.answer: You could face penalties of 10~20% of the unreported amount. If unreported amount exceeds ₩5B, criminal charges (up to 2 years imprisonment or 13~20% fine) may apply.

items: Integration of bank and cryptocurrency exchange account information
Other related services provided by the Company

article2.disclaimer2: Information provided by the Company is for reference purposes only. The final decision and responsibility for investments lies with the member.
article2.disclaimer3: The Company may modify or discontinue part or all of the Service.
